title: ruehssia longiflora
intro: Ruehssia longiflora is a type of flowering plant species, also known as the Chinese Rue or Long Flower Rue, belonging to the family Apiaceae. The medicinal properties of Ruehssia longiflora include its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The health benefits associated with this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, and act as a natural diuretic. Ruehssia longiflora can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried herb for use in herbal remedies, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
